transcription.text: We're on the road showing real people the stain-fighting power of OxyClean. I have a big stain. Let's see what happens with OxyClean. It's coming out! Wow, that's crazy. Grape juice on a teddy bear. The grape juice is coming right out. I'm very surprised it came out so fast. Dirty lace is very hard to clean. That's night and day. From dingy to white in seconds. OxyClean gets the tough stains out. And now, try upgraded OxyClean laundry detergent, for people who are serious about clean.
